About_&_Key_Points:
About
ITC Hotels is an Indian hospitality company that operates and manages hotels, with over 200 hotels. It has a franchise agreement to operate most of its hotels as part of The Luxury Collection of Marriott International. It operates hotels across 90+ destinations under brands like ITC Hotels, Mementos, Epiq Collection Storii, Welcomhotel, Fortune, and Welcome Heritage.
[1]
[2]
Key Points
Demerger
[1]
ITC Hotels was created following the demerger of the hotel business from ITC Limited. The scheme of arrangement was approved in Aug’23, under which ITC Hotels was separated as an independent entity. As part of the arrangement, ITC retained a
40% stake in ITC Hotels
, while the remaining
60% stake was allotted to ITC Limited’s shareholders
in proportion to their shareholding on the record date.
The scheme received approvals from shareholders and the National Company Law Tribunal. The certified copy of the
NCLT Kolkata Bench order dated Oct’24
sanctioning the scheme was received in
Dec’24
, after which the demerger
became effective from Jan’25
. ITC Hotels was subsequently
listed on the stock exchanges on 29 Jan’25.
